name: standards-comparator declines to answer when no relevant grounding source is found
command: printf '{"question":"how to handle xyz","grounded_sources":[]}\n' > query.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/comparator-validate.sh" --query query.json --check declined 2>out.txt && grep -q 'declined=true' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=no_grounding_available' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
